ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the game (e.g., opponent team) */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "sacrifice_hits" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by pitch */,
  "intentional_walks" INTEGER /* Number of intentional walks */,
  "gdp" INTEGER /* Number of grounded into double plays */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Inning in which the stats were recorded */,
  "opponent_pitcher" TEXT /* Name of the opposing pitcher */,
  "inning_outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs in the inning */,
  "inning_score" TEXT /* Score at the end of the inning */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Number of pitches seen by the player */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., ground ball, fly ball) */,
  "hit_location" TEXT /* Location on the field where the hit landed */,
  "bat_speed" REAL /* Speed of the bat at impact */,
  "exit_velocity" REAL /* Speed of the ball off the bat */,
  "pitch_speed" REAL /* Speed of the pitch */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch (e.g., fastball, curveball) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting side (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing side (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at the start of the game */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each performance entry
Category of the game (e.g., opponent team)
Number of times hit by pitch
Number of grounded into double plays
Inning in which the stats were recorded
Number of outs in the inning
Score at the end of the inning
Number of spectators at the game
Number of pitches seen by the player
Type of play (e.g., ground ball, fly ball)
Location on the field where the hit landed
Speed of the bat at impact
Speed of the ball off the bat
Date of birth of the player
Start date of the player's contract
End date of the player's contract
Number of spectators at the game
Temperature at the start of the game
